issue.message:
Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.common.lint.NavigationCommonIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.lifetime.KaDefaultLifetimeTokenProvider#Companion (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/UtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `EmptyNavDeepLink`,`WrongStartDestinationType`,`MissingSerializableAnnotation`,`MissingKeepAnnotation`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).

Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.compose.lint.NavigationComposeIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.lifetime.KaDefaultLifetimeTokenProvider#Companion (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/UtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `ComposableDestinationInComposeScope` `ComposableNavGraphInComposeScope` `UnrememberedGetBackStackEntry` `WrongStartDestinationType` `MissingKeepAnnotation` `MissingSerializableAnnotation`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).

Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.runtime.lint.NavigationRuntimeIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.lifetime.KaDefaultLifetimeTokenProvider#Companion (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/UtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `DeepLinkInActivityDestination`,`WrongStartDestinationType`,`WrongNavigateRouteType`,`MissingKeepAnnotation`,`MissingSerializableAnnotation`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: Text("₹${String.format("%.2f", predictedSales)}", fontSize = 28.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.ExtraBold, color = colorScheme.primary)

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: Text("₹${String.format("%.2f", amount)}", fontSize = 18.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = color)

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.7.0 is available: 9.2.1. (There is also a newer version of 8.7.𝑥 available, if upgrading to 9.2.1 is difficult: 8.7.3)

This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage.class)`
produceState calls should assign `value` inside the producer lambda
produceState calls should assign `value` inside the producer lambda
issue.errorLine1: val logs by produceState(initialValue = emptyList<AuditLogEntry>(), subjectId, subject) {

issue.message: produceState calls should assign `value` inside the producer lambda
produceState calls should assign `value` inside the producer lambda

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_shared_khata_beta_desc">Customer ledger: publish a read-only link with OTP. Requires deployed backend.</string>
<string name="settings_bank_auto_settle_desc">When enabled, matching bank SMS may suggest a pending bill to settle (notification only; confirm in app).</string>
<string name="settings_staff_desc">Manage staff records on this device</string>
<string name="settings_inventory_desc">View product list and stock from local database</string>
<string name="inventory_empty_state">No products yet. Add products when inventory entry is wired from bills or catalog.</string>
<string name="bank_match_notification_body">Amount ≈ ₹%1$.2f — review bill #%2$s in the app before recording settlement.</string>
<string name="guide_dashboard_step1">Add customers from the Customers tab to start a digital ledger.</string>
<string name="guide_dashboard_step2">Open a customer, add Udhaar / Jama entries, or create a bill from the ledger.</string>
<string name="guide_dashboard_step3">Use Settings for backup, GST mode, and beta tools like shared khata.</string>
<string name="customer_share_online_khata_failed">Could not publish shared khata. Check internet or try later.</string>
<string name="customer_shared_khata_dialog_body">Send the link and OTP. Customer opens the link, enters OTP, and sees read-only balance and entries.</string>
<string name="customer_interest_help">Estimate simple flat interest on the current ledger balance. Change annual rate and number of days — nothing is saved to the database.</string>

<string name="interest_estimate_share_text">Interest estimate (display only)
Principal: %1$s
Rate: %2$s p.a.
Period: %3$d days
Estimated interest: %4$s

Ledger principal is unchanged.</string>

<string name="bulk_reminder_help">Select customers, pick 2:00 PM, 4:00 PM, or 5:00 PM (uses today or tomorrow if that time already passed). One pending reminder per customer is written to your queue. Customers with zero or negative balance are skipped. Keep Auto reminder ON per customer in Settings for automatic sends.</string>
<string name="customer_upi_missing">Add your UPI ID in Business Profile first.</string>
<string name="customer_upi_none_installed">No UPI app found on this phone.</string>
<string name="support_whatsapp_prefill">Hello — I need help with HisabKitab Pro (Help & Support).</string>
<string name="help_screen_tagline">Search topics, read common answers, or chat with our team during support hours.</string>
<string name="help_privacy_policy_subtitle">How we collect, use, and protect your data</string>
<string name="help_submit_ticket_subtitle">We\u2019ll route this by email or WhatsApp</string>
<string name="help_unable_open_link">Can\u2019t open this link right now.</string>
<string name="support_ticket_dialog_hint">Describe your issue (what happened, which screen, your device\u2026)</string>
<string name="support_ticket_empty">Please add a short description first.</string>
<string name="share_app_message">I use HisabKitab Pro for ledger, billing, and reminders. Install it here: %1$s</string>

<string name="support_hours_dialog_body">Thank you for contacting HisabKitab Pro.

Our live support team is available every day from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM in your device’s local time zone.

You are reaching us outside those hours. You can still open WhatsApp to leave a message; we will respond as soon as possible during the next support window.</string>
<string name="support_whatsapp_off_hours_prefix">[Outside live support hours — we reply 10:00 AM–5:00 PM local time]\nThank you for your patience. Please find my message below:</string>
<string name="customer_sort_reminder_sheet_hint">Pick one or more reminder buckets. Leave all unchecked to show every customer. Applies to search too.</string>
<string name="reminder_qr_footer">You can scan the QR above or use the payment link below.</string>
<string name="reminder_master_polite">Hello %1$s, your net balance due is %2$s. Please pay at your earliest convenience.</string>
<string name="reminder_master_professional">Hello %1$s, your net balance due is %2$s. Kindly clear this soon.</string>
<string name="reminder_master_strict">Important: %1$s, an amount of %2$s remains outstanding. Please settle immediately.</string>
<string name="reminder_partial_body">Hello %1$s, your total due is %2$s.\nIf paying in full is difficult now, please pay %3$s today and commit to clear the rest by the agreed date.</string>
<string name="reminder_wa_simple">Hello! You have a due balance of %1$s. Please pay at your earliest convenience.\n— HisabKitab Pro</string>
<string name="reminder_adaptive_0">Dear %1$s, a friendly reminder regarding your pending balance of %2$s. Please settle at your earliest convenience. Thank you!</string>
<string name="reminder_adaptive_1">Hello %1$s, we noticed a pending payment of %2$s. We would appreciate it if you could complete the payment soon. Best regards.</string>
<string name="reminder_adaptive_2">Dear %1$s, this is a formal reminder for your overdue balance of %2$s. Please process the payment today to avoid any inconvenience.</string>

<string name="reminder_adaptive_3">URGENT: Dear %1$s, your balance of %2$s is significantly overdue. Please settle this immediately or contact us if you face any issues. Regards, Business Team.</string>
<string name="reminder_sms_no_due">No due amount for SMS reminder</string>

<string name="reminder_sms_body_no_pay">%1$s
Hello %2$s, your net due is %3$s.
Please clear the payment soon.
- %1$s | HisabKitab Pro</string>

<string name="reminder_sms_body_with_pay">%1$s
Hello %2$s, your net due is %3$s.
Please clear the payment soon.
Pay: %4$s
- %1$s | HisabKitab Pro</string>
<string name="reminder_sms_supplier_payable">%1$s\nNamaste %2$s, our records show a pending payable of %3$s to you. We will coordinate settlement shortly.\n— %1$s | HisabKitab Pro</string>
<string name="reminder_supplier_master_polite">Namaste %1$s, we confirm a payable of %2$s in our books. Thank you for your patience; we are arranging payment.</string>
<string name="reminder_supplier_master_professional">Dear %1$s, payable per our ledger: %2$s. Payment will be scheduled as per agreed terms.</string>
<string name="reminder_supplier_master_strict">%1$s — outstanding payable %2$s must be settled urgently. Please reply with your preferred payment timeline.</string>
<string name="reminder_supplier_partial">Namaste %1$s, total payable %2$s. We propose an immediate partial transfer of %3$s and will settle the remainder soon.</string>
<string name="reminder_auto_pending_message">Hello %1$s, you have %2$s pending on HisabKitab Pro.</string>
<string name="supplier_reconcile_whatsapp_message">Hello, our outstanding balance is %1$s. Please tap here to confirm: %2$s</string>
<string name="visiting_required_fields">Business name, owner name, and phone are required.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="interest_estimate_share_text">Interest estimate (display only)
Principal: %1$s
Rate: %2$s p.a.
Period: %3$d days
Estimated interest: %4$s

Ledger principal is unchanged.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("reminder"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera" required="false">` tag
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
Very long vector path (1249 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
